debug_info.goal:
c : ℤ
X✝ Y✝ Z✝ : FintypeCat
⊢ ∀ (f : X✝ ⟶ Y✝) (g : Y✝ ⟶ Z✝), sorry (CategoryStruct.comp f g) = CategoryStruct.comp (sorry f) (sorry g)

by

    exact (Finsupp.mapDomain_mapDomain f g x.1).symm
